bird.name: Long-bearded honeyeater
bird.summary: The long-bearded honeyeater (Melionyx princeps), is a bird in the honeyeater family Meliphagidae. This species was formerly placed in the g…

relations.subject: Long-bearded honeyeater
relations.evidence: (June, 2010). Where once it was thought that it was threatened by habitat loss, it is now believed that its ability to live on edges of fragmented land may mean that it is less at risk
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Long-bearded honeyeater
relations.evidence: Climate change remains a potential threat
relations.object_summary: 长期改变水文节律与生态系统稳定性的全球变化因素。
